title: Tricky wet/dry conditions challenge drivers as 24H Nürburgring qualifying begins
summary: The 54th ADAC RAVENOL 24 Hours of the Nürburgring kicked off Thursday afternoon amid typical Eifel weather. After rainy conditions at the start of Qualifying 1 and numerous spins, there were some fast lap times on a dry track midway through the session, before heavy rain and even hail set in toward the end.
